sentences.english: Thanks for joining the call, everyone.
We need to discuss some changes to the project scope.
sentences.korean: 프로젝트 범위 변경에 대해 논의해야 합니다.

sentences.english: What kind of changes are we looking at?
The client wants to add a mobile app component to the existing web platform project.
sentences.korean: 고객이 기존 웹 플랫폼 프로젝트에 모바일 앱 구성요소를 추가하기를 원합니다.

sentences.english: It will definitely impact our timeline and budget.
sentences.korean: 일정과 예산에 확실히 영향을 줄 거예요.

sentences.english: We'd need at least two additional developers and roughly six extra weeks.
sentences.korean: 최소 개발자 2명 추가와 대략 6주의 추가 기간이 필요합니다.

sentences.english: Has the client approved the additional budget?
Not yet, but they've indicated they're open to it as long as we can deliver by Q3.
sentences.korean: 아직 아니지만 3분기까지 납품할 수 있다면 수용할 의향이 있다고 했습니다.

sentences.english: I'll put together a detailed proposal with revised milestones and send it to the team by Friday.
sentences.korean: 수정된 이정표가 포함된 상세 제안서를 작성해서 금요일까지 팀에 보내겠습니다.

quiz.question: What does '이정표/주요 단계' mean in English?
